description: Create a Causal Loop Diagram (CLD) in draw.io visualizing three major climate feedback loops centered on 'Global Mean Temperature'. Use the specific loops and polarities provided in '~/Desktop/feedback_loops_data.txt', which include the Ice-Albedo Feedback, Permafrost Carbon Feedback, and Water Vapor Feedback. The diagram must use curved connectors for all relationships, include '+' or '-' labels on every arrow according to the data file, and feature an 'R' (Reinforcing) label inside each of the three loops. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/climate_loops.drawio' and export it as a PNG to '~/Desktop/climate_loops.png'.
